plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MindPath to use the camera to photograph medication.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow MindPath to access photos for medication and memory images.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow MindPath to share the patient's live location with their caregiver.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow MindPath to keep sharing the patient's live location with their caregiver, even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow MindPath to keep sharing the patient's live location with their caregiver, even when the app is in the background.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow MindPath to record reassuring voice notes for important people.
